Name: SamplingInformationSchemeName
Description: A name for the sampling information scheme.

Name: Label
Description: A display label for the sampling information scheme.

Name: Description
Description: A description of the use of the sampling information scheme.

Name: SamplingInformationSchemeReference
Description: Provides for inclusion by reference of external sampling information schemes.

Name: SampleFrameReference
Description: An item (that is, a sample frame) belonging to the sampling information Scheme.

Name: SamplingPlanReference
Description: An item (that is, a sampling plan) belonging to the sampling information Scheme.

Name: SampleReference
Description: An item (that is, a sample) belonging to the sampling information Scheme.

Name: SamplingInformationGroupReference
Description: An item (that is, a sampling information group) belonging to the sampling information Scheme.
